description:
## Problem

Logger crashes with formatter error when logging job IDs:

```
FORMATTER ERROR: bad return value
Logger.Formatter, got [[<<150, 220, 30, 126...>>]] after "Discarding job "
```

## Root Cause

Job IDs are 16-byte binaries from `:crypto.strong_rand_bytes(16)`. When used in string interpolation for logging, these non-UTF8 binaries cause the Logger formatter to fail.

## Location

`apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/consumer/manager.ex:195`:
```elixir
Logger.info("Discarding job #{lease.item_id}: #{inspect(reason)}")
```

## Fix

Encode binary IDs before logging:
```elixir
Logger.info("Discarding job #{Base.encode16(lease.item_id)}: #{inspect(reason)}")
```
title: Fix Logger formatter error with binary job IDs
